title: Fishi_SomethingPack
description: Enjoy vanilla with QoL changes as well as the technical side of Minecraft.
body:
# Fishi_SomethingPack
A slightly smaller mod pack with mostly deco mods. The biggest changes to vanilla gameplay are the Create and ComputerCraft mods. Enjoy the new decoration and build new beautiful decorated buildings or build huge mass productions and automate stuff with programming.

## What's in the modpack?
- new animals (Alex's Mobs)
- computers (ComputerCraft)
- Just Enough Items
- new cooking recipes (Farmers Delight)
- many decoration items, like Macaws Doors and Supplementaries
- new option to cover long distances (Waystones)
- Create and Trains

### CurseForge mods:
- Nature's Compass [(visit)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/natures-compass)
- Macaw's Bridges [(visit)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges)
- Macaw's Doors [(visit)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-doors)
- Macaw's Fences and Walls [(visit)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-fences-and-walls)
- Macaw's Trapdoors [(visit)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-trapdoors)
